name: Buffalo Chicken Strips
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds boneless skinless chicken breast halves, cut into 1-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the milk, honey, and hot pepper sauce in a shallow dish.
2. Add the chicken strips and marinate for at least 10 minutes.
3. In another shallow dish, mix the cornflakes, ground ginger, dried thyme, dried tarragon, and cayenne pepper.
4. Dip each marinated chicken strip into the cornflake mixture to coat evenly.
5. Place the coated chicken strips on a jelly roll pan sprayed with Pam cooking spray.
6. Bake at 400°F for 10-15 minutes, or until crispy. Serve with blue cheese dressing, if desired.
